ground_truth.title: Project Management Certificate | UC San Diego Division of Extended Studies
ground_truth.main_content: Advance your career and gain in-demand project management skills with the Professional Certificate in Project Management from UC San Diego Extended Studies. This program is designed for anyone in any industry who wants to strengthen leadership, planning, and communication skills while learning to manage projects effectively from start to finish. With flexible learning, expert instructors, and a curriculum aligned with industry standards, you will gain the knowledge and confidence to lead successful projects in any industry regardless of project complexity. Program Details: Flexible formats (In-Person, Online, Live Online), 9 Months duration (depends on courses taken per quarter; up to 5 years to complete), $4,900 total cost (pay per course - 7 courses total to complete the certificate). The program is ideal for those new to the field, career changers, mid-career professionals, individuals preparing for PMP Certification, and professionals in technology, healthcare, construction, finance, and other industries. Course Requirements: Foundational Course (Choose One) - Project Management Essentials or Project Management Boot Camp; Core Courses (All Required) - Project Planning and Scheduling, Project Cost Management, Leading and Managing Change, Work Team Concepts and Skills; Electives (Minimum 4 Units) - Agile Power Practices, Interest-Based Negotiation, Project Risk Management, Transformational Leadership, Purchasing and Procurement Process. Upon completion, you will receive a Professional Certificate in Project Management from UC San Diego Division of Extended Studies, representing mastery of an established body of knowledge with a minimum of 120 classroom instruction hours.
with: Advance your career and gain in-demand project management skills with the Professional Certificate in Project Management from UC San Diego Extended Studies.
This program is designed for anyone in any industry who wants to strengthen leadership, planning, and communication skills while learning to manage projects effectively from start to finish.
The Professional Certificate in Project Management is ideal for anyone ready to build or advance their career in the field.
Upon successful completion of the Project Management program, you will receive a Professional Certificate in Project Management from UC San Diego Division of Extended Studies.
Curriculum is based on the Project Management Body of Knowledge (PMBOK) developed by the Project Management Institute (PMI).
